summary: Completed comprehensive testing of autonomous action engine for missiAI. All 223 unit tests pass across 19 test files. Verified all components, exports, integrations, and functionality requirements.
passed_tests: All 223 unit tests pass (19 test files) including 3 new action test files
Types: ActionType, ActionIntent, ActionResult, ActionHistory exports verified
Intent Detector: detectIntent and isActionable functions verified
Action Executor: executeAction with all 8 action handlers verified
Action Registry: ACTION_DESCRIPTIONS, getActionLabel, ACTION_TRIGGERS exports verified
API Route: POST and GET handlers with edge runtime verified
Hook: useActionEngine with detectAndExecute, clearResult, savedItems verified
ActionCard Component: All required data-testid attributes present
Chat Page Integration: useActionEngine and ActionCard properly imported and used
Validation Schema: actionSchema included and used in API route
Safe Math Parser: Handles '2 + 2', '15% of 2400', '12 * 5' without eval()
AI Service: gemini-3-flash-preview remains as default model
